details.special: PSI: Levitation, Telekinesis, Kinetic Leap, Thought Shield, Invisibility, Crush Life WT: Life Detection, All-Round Vision, Know Direction Powers: 12 Rank: 3rd Pursuit: Always pursue prey that flees. Favored prey: Often develop a taste for a certain type of meat (this may include humans!), hunting that creature with preference. Infravision: 90’ Surprise: On a 1–4, in woodland or desert, due to camo

system.description:
Hunting cacti stand 3 feet high and have 1d6 long, trailing vines that it uses to hunt and kill prey.
